notes: Schaumburg office at 1827 Walden Office Square, Suite 200, Schaumburg, IL 60173. Also Chicago office at 343 W. Erie St Suite 330 (312-944-2611, AskUs@associa.us). Manages HOAs, condos, high-rises, single/multi-family neighborhoods.

24/7 Customer Care: 847-459-0000. Downtown office: 312-335-1950 at 303 E Wacker Dr Suite 1900, Chicago 60601. Suburban office: 2000 Center Dr B415, Hoffman Estates 60192. Manages townhomes, single-family, low/mid/high-rise communities, master-planned communities. No dedicated vendor portal found.

750 W Lake Cook Rd Suite 190, Buffalo Grove, IL 60089. After-hours emergency: 630-462-3144. AAMC accredited. Manages HOAs, condos, townhome associations, master-planned communities, active adult communities across Lake, Cook, McHenry, Will, DuPage, Kane counties.

875 N. Michigan Ave., Suite 3980, Chicago, IL 60611. 24/7 emergency same number. Chicago's leading residential property management company - condos and homeowner associations. Contact via phone or online forms (no public email listed). President: Steven P. Levy.

55 E. Monroe St., Suite 3900, Chicago, IL 60603. $1.4B in assets under management. Manages residential high-rises and rental buildings. Contact form allows selecting 'Property Management' as inquiry category. 132 years in business.

2901 Butterfield Road, Oak Brook, IL 60523. Property management direct email: propertymanagement@inlandgroup.com. Residential: YouMatter@inlandresidentialrealestate.com (ext 6300). Manages multifamily/luxury apartments, commercial/office, self-storage, senior living. $125B+ in transactions since 1968.

One Oakbrook Terrace, Suite 400, Oakbrook Terrace, IL 60181. Fax: 630-932-7258. Management Services head Carrie Szarzynski: 630-317-0718, cszarzynski@hiffman.com. COO Michael Flynn: 630-691-0600, mflynn@hiffman.com. Manages 137.4M SF across 982 buildings - industrial, office, retail properties.

HQ: 6111 W. Plano Parkway Suite 1000, Plano TX 75093. Serves Illinois communities. Manages mixed-use, high-rise, single-family HOAs and condo associations. ~2000 employees serving 950,000+ homes. Hours: Mon-Fri 7:30am-7pm CST.

entity: Simon Property Group (Woodfield Mall, Gurnee Mills)

Woodfield Mall management office can typically be reached through the mall's main number.

Website returned 404 on vendor/contact pages tested. Brookfield manages Northbrook Court mall. Visit brookfieldproperties.com directly and search for vendor registration or contact their property management team.
Website (patrickdealer.com) refused connection. Try searching for individual Patrick dealership locations in Schaumburg for facilities contacts.

Corporate site is ednapleton.com. 80+ dealership locations across FL, IL, IN, MN, MO, PA, WI. Could not extract specific corporate contact from site. Try calling individual Napleton dealership locations in the Chicago suburbs and ask for facilities manager.

Schaumburg location (CDJR): 208 W Golf Rd, Schaumburg, IL 60195, (847) 882-8400. 70+ locations across IL, IN, MI, WI. For corporate vendor inquiries, use their contact page or call the Schaumburg location and ask for facilities/operations.
AutoNation vendor info page returned 403. AutoNation is the largest US auto dealer group. Search for 'AutoNation vendor registration' or contact individual Chicago-area locations for facilities.

Marriott has a supply chain portal at marriottglobal.com/supply-chain. Their supplier diversity program exists but detailed registration info was behind authentication. Search 'Marriott supplier registration' for current portal access. Individual hotels may also contract local vendors directly - contact hotel GM or engineering department.

Hilton procurement/supply chain pages returned 404. Search for 'Hilton supplier diversity' or 'Hilton vendor registration'. Individual Hilton hotels often contract local services through their engineering/facilities department - contact hotels directly.

Hyatt vendor pages returned 403. Hyatt HQ is in Chicago (150 N Riverside Plaza). Search 'Hyatt supplier registration' for current portal. Individual hotels contract local vendors - contact the hotel's Director of Engineering or Facilities.

1821 Walden Office Square, Suite 100, Schaumburg, IL 60173. Membership for business partners available - provides access to service directory, networking events, educational programs, career center. Excellent way to connect with HOA boards and property managers. Active on Facebook, Twitter, LinkedIn, YouTube, Instagram.

entity: BOMA Chicago (Building Owners and Managers Association)
notes: Website content could not be fully extracted. BOMA Chicago offers Allied Membership for service providers/vendors. Visit bomachicago.org directly and look for 'Membership' or 'Allied Members' section. Great way to connect with commercial building owners and managers.

entity: IREM Chicago Chapter #23 (Institute of Real Estate Management)
notes: Offers Industry Partner Program for vendors - includes directory listing, event sponsorship opportunities, and networking. Apply through their Industry Partner Application on the website. Active since 1953. Join at irem.org/membership. Active on Facebook, LinkedIn, Instagram (@iremchicago).
